---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[Feature Request]: "
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

# 💡 Feature Request

---

## 🎯 Feature Description

**What is the feature you're requesting?**

_Please describe the feature in clear, concise terms. What problem does it solve? Who will benefit from it?_

---

## 🧩 Use Case & Context

**How would you use this feature?**

_Provide real-world examples or scenarios where this feature would be beneficial. The more specific, the better._

---

## 🔍 Current Limitations

**What are you unable to do currently?**

_Describe the limitations or pain points in the current version that this feature would address._

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

**Have you considered other solutions?**

_Have you thought of other ways to achieve this? Why didn't they work? What makes your proposed solution better?_

---

## ⭐ Priority Level

**How important is this feature to you?**

- [ ] Low — Nice to have
- [ ] Medium — Useful for many users
- [ ] High — Essential for core functionality
- [ ] Critical — Blocking my workflow

---

## 🎨 Mockup / Example (Optional)

**Visual representation of the feature**

_If applicable, add screenshots, mockups, or code examples showing how this feature might look or work._

---

## 🌐 Additional Context

**Any other information?**

_Add any other context, links, or references that might help us understand and implement this feature._


---

### ✅ Pre-submission Checklist

- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have provided a clear and detailed description
- [ ] I have explained the use case thoroughly
- [ ] I have considered alternative approaches
- [ ] I agree to follow the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)

---

**Thank you for helping improve CyberFind!** 🚀
